title: Biggest drop-off at Absence Declared
description: 27% of users drop off at the absence declared stage. This is the #1 conversion bottleneck.

title: Low study time → high failure rate
description: Users spending <3 minutes have 100% failure rate vs 27% for users spending more time.

title: prof_001 rejects 1.5x more than average
description: prof_001 has 53% approval rate vs 82% average (1676 reviews). This is a potential bottleneck.

title: prof_002 rejects 1.5x more than average
description: prof_002 has 54% approval rate vs 82% average (2295 reviews). This is a potential bottleneck.

title: D1→D7 retention drops -0%
description: Day 1 retention is 48% but drops to 49% by Day 7 — a -0% loss. Early engagement is critical.

title: Massive engagement gap between segments
description: Power users average 70 sessions vs 13 for at-risk users — a 56 session gap.
